ayahs.textArabic: إِنَّآ أَرۡسَلۡنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوۡمِهِۦٓ أَنۡ أَنذِرۡ قَوۡمَكَ مِن قَبۡلِ أَن يَأۡتِيَهُمۡ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٞ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Inna arsalna noohan ila qawmihi an anthir qawmaka min qabli an yatiyahum AAathabun aleemun
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed, We sent Noah to his people, [saying], "Warn your people before there comes to them a painful punishment."
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Indeed, We sent Noah to his people ˹saying to him˺, “Warn your people before a painful punishment comes to them.”

ayahs.textArabic: قَالَ يَٰقَوۡمِ إِنِّي لَكُمۡ نَذِيرٞ مُّبِينٌ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Qala ya qawmi innee lakum natheerun mubeenun
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: He said, "O my people, indeed I am to you a clear warner,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Noah proclaimed, “O my people! I am truly sent to you with a clear warning:

ayahs.textArabic: أَنِ ٱعۡبُدُواْ ٱللَّهَ وَٱتَّقُوهُ وَأَطِيعُونِ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Ani oAAbudoo Allaha waittaqoohu waateeAAooni
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: [Saying], 'Worship Allah, fear Him and obey me.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: worship Allah ˹alone˺, fear Him, and obey me.

ayahs.textArabic: يَغۡفِرۡ لَكُم مِّن ذُنُوبِكُمۡ وَيُؤَخِّرۡكُمۡ إِلَىٰٓ أَجَلٖ مُّسَمًّىۚ إِنَّ أَجَلَ ٱللَّهِ إِذَا جَآءَ لَا يُؤَخَّرُۚ لَوۡ كُنتُمۡ تَعۡلَمُونَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Yaghfir lakum min thunoobikum wayuakhkhirkum ila ajalin musamman inna ajala Allahi itha jaa la yuakhkharu law kuntum taAAlamoona
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Allah will forgive you of your sins and delay you for a specified term. Indeed, the time [set by] Allah, when it comes, will not be delayed, if you only knew.' "
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: He will forgive your sins, and delay your end until the appointed time. Indeed, when the time set by Allah comes, it cannot be delayed, if only you knew!”

ayahs.textArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّي دَعَوۡتُ قَوۡمِي لَيۡلٗا وَنَهَارٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Qala rabbi innee daAAawtu qawmee laylan wanaharan
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: He said, "My Lord, indeed I invited my people [to truth] night and day.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: He cried, “My Lord! I have surely called my people day and night,

ayahs.textArabic: فَلَمۡ يَزِدۡهُمۡ دُعَآءِيٓ إِلَّا فِرَارٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Falam yazidhum duAAaee illa firaran
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: But my invitation increased them not except in flight.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: but my calls only made them run farther away.

ayahs.textArabic: وَإِنِّي كُلَّمَا دَعَوۡتُهُمۡ لِتَغۡفِرَ لَهُمۡ جَعَلُوٓاْ أَصَٰبِعَهُمۡ فِيٓ ءَاذَانِهِمۡ وَٱسۡتَغۡشَوۡاْ ثِيَابَهُمۡ وَأَصَرُّواْ وَٱسۡتَكۡبَرُواْ ٱسۡتِكۡبَارٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Wainnee kullama daAAawtuhum litaghfira lahum jaAAaloo asabiAAahum fee athanihim waistaghshaw thiyabahum waasarroo waistakbaroo istikbaran
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And indeed, every time I invited them that You may forgive them, they put their fingers in their ears, covered themselves with their garments, persisted, and were arrogant with [great] arrogance.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And whenever I invite them to be forgiven by You, they press their fingers into their ears, cover themselves with their clothes, persist ˹in denial˺, and act very arrogantly.

ayahs.textArabic: ثُمَّ إِنِّي دَعَوۡتُهُمۡ جِهَارٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Thumma innee daAAawtuhum jiharan
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Then I invited them publicly.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Then I certainly called them openly,

ayahs.textArabic: ثُمَّ إِنِّيٓ أَعۡلَنتُ لَهُمۡ وَأَسۡرَرۡتُ لَهُمۡ إِسۡرَارٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Thumma innee aAAlantu lahum waasrartu lahum israran
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Then I announced to them and [also] confided to them secretly
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: then I surely preached to them publicly and privately,

ayahs.textArabic: فَقُلۡتُ ٱسۡتَغۡفِرُواْ رَبَّكُمۡ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ غَفَّارٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Faqultu istaghfiroo rabbakum innahu kana ghaffaran
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And said, 'Ask forgiveness of your Lord. Indeed, He is ever a Perpetual Forgiver.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: saying, ‘Seek your Lord’s forgiveness, ˹for˺ He is truly Most Forgiving.

ayahs.textArabic: يُرۡسِلِ ٱلسَّمَآءَ عَلَيۡكُم مِّدۡرَارٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Yursili alssamaa AAalaykum midraran
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: He will send [rain from] the sky upon you in [continuing] showers
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: He will shower you with abundant rain,

ayahs.textArabic: وَيُمۡدِدۡكُم بِأَمۡوَٰلٖ وَبَنِينَ وَيَجۡعَل لَّكُمۡ جَنَّٰتٖ وَيَجۡعَل لَّكُمۡ أَنۡهَٰرٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Wayumdidkum biamwalin wabaneena wayajAAal lakum jannatin wayajAAal lakum anharan
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And give you increase in wealth and children and provide for you gardens and provide for you rivers.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: supply you with wealth and children, and give you gardens as well as rivers.

ayahs.textArabic: مَّا لَكُمۡ لَا تَرۡجُونَ لِلَّهِ وَقَارٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Ma lakum la tarjoona lillahi waqaran
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: What is [the matter] with you that you do not attribute to Allah [due] grandeur
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: What is the matter with you that you are not in awe of the Majesty of Allah,

ayahs.textArabic: وَقَدۡ خَلَقَكُمۡ أَطۡوَارًا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Waqad khalaqakum atwaran
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: While He has created you in stages?
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: when He truly created you in stages ˹of development˺?

ayahs.textArabic: أَلَمۡ تَرَوۡاْ كَيۡفَ خَلَقَ ٱللَّهُ سَبۡعَ سَمَٰوَٰتٖ طِبَاقٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Alam taraw kayfa khalaqa Allahu sabAAa samawatin tibaqan
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Do you not consider how Allah has created seven heavens in layers
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Do you not see how Allah created seven heavens, one above the other,

ayahs.textArabic: وَجَعَلَ ٱلۡقَمَرَ فِيهِنَّ نُورٗا وَجَعَلَ ٱلشَّمۡسَ سِرَاجٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: WajaAAala alqamara feehinna nooran wajaAAala alshshamsa sirajan
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And made the moon therein a [reflected] light and made the sun a burning lamp?
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: placing the moon within them as a ˹reflected˺ light, and the sun as a ˹radiant˺ lamp?

ayahs.textArabic: وَٱللَّهُ أَنۢبَتَكُم مِّنَ ٱلۡأَرۡضِ نَبَاتٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: WaAllahu anbatakum mina alardi nabatan
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And Allah has caused you to grow from the earth a [progressive] growth.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Allah ˹alone˺ caused you to grow from the earth like a plant.

ayahs.textArabic: ثُمَّ يُعِيدُكُمۡ فِيهَا وَيُخۡرِجُكُمۡ إِخۡرَاجٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Thumma yuAAeedukum feeha wayukhrijukum ikhrajan
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Then He will return you into it and extract you [another] extraction.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Then He will return you to it, and then simply bring you forth ˹again˺.

ayahs.textArabic: وَٱللَّهُ جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ بِسَاطٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: WaAllahu jaAAala lakumu alarda bisatan
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And Allah has made for you the earth an expanse
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And Allah ˹alone˺ spread out the earth for you

ayahs.textArabic: لِّتَسۡلُكُواْ مِنۡهَا سُبُلٗا فِجَاجٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Litaslukoo minha subulan fijajan
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: That you may follow therein roads of passage.' "
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: to walk along its spacious pathways.’”

ayahs.textArabic: قَالَ نُوحٞ رَّبِّ إِنَّهُمۡ عَصَوۡنِي وَٱتَّبَعُواْ مَن لَّمۡ يَزِدۡهُ مَالُهُۥ وَوَلَدُهُۥٓ إِلَّا خَسَارٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Qala noohun rabbi innahum AAasawnee waittabaAAoo man lam yazidhu maluhu wawaladuhu illa khasaran
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Noah said, "My Lord, indeed they have disobeyed me and followed him whose wealth and children will not increase him except in loss.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹Eventually,˺ Noah cried, “My Lord! They have certainly persisted in disobeying me, and followed ˹instead˺ those ˹elite˺ whose ˹abundant˺ wealth and children only increase them in loss,

ayahs.textArabic: وَمَكَرُواْ مَكۡرٗا كُبَّارٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Wamakaroo makran kubbaran
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And they conspired an immense conspiracy.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and who have devised a tremendous plot,

ayahs.textArabic: وَقَالُواْ لَا تَذَرُنَّ ءَالِهَتَكُمۡ وَلَا تَذَرُنَّ وَدّٗا وَلَا سُوَاعٗا وَلَا يَغُوثَ وَيَعُوقَ وَنَسۡرٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Waqaloo la tatharunna alihatakum wala tatharunna waddan wala suwaAAan wala yaghootha wayaAAooqa wanasran
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And said, 'Never leave your gods and never leave Wadd or Suwa' or Yaghuth and Ya'uq and Nasr.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: urging ˹their followers˺, ‘Do not abandon your idols—especially Wadd, Suwâ’, Yaghûth, Ya’ûq, and Nasr.’

ayahs.textArabic: وَقَدۡ أَضَلُّواْ كَثِيرٗاۖ وَلَا تَزِدِ ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ إِلَّا ضَلَٰلٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Waqad adalloo katheeran wala tazidi alththalimeena illa dalalan
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And already they have misled many. And, [my Lord], do not increase the wrongdoers except in error."
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Those ˹elite˺ have already led many astray. So ˹O Lord˺, only allow the wrongdoers to stray farther away.”

ayahs.textArabic: مِّمَّا خَطِيٓـَٰٔتِهِمۡ أُغۡرِقُواْ فَأُدۡخِلُواْ نَارٗا فَلَمۡ يَجِدُواْ لَهُم مِّن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ أَنصَارٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Mimma khateeatihim oghriqoo faodkhiloo naran falam yajidoo lahum min dooni Allahi ansaran
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Because of their sins they were drowned and put into the Fire, and they found not for themselves besides Allah [any] helpers.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: So because of their sins, they were drowned, then admitted into the Fire. And they found none to help them against Allah.

ayahs.textArabic: وَقَالَ نُوحٞ رَّبِّ لَا تَذَرۡ عَلَى ٱلۡأَرۡضِ مِنَ ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ دَيَّارًا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Waqala noohun rabbi la tathar AAala alardi mina alkafireena dayyaran
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And Noah said, "My Lord, do not leave upon the earth from among the disbelievers an inhabitant.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Noah had prayed, “My Lord! Do not leave a single disbeliever on earth.

ayahs.textArabic: إِنَّكَ إِن تَذَرۡهُمۡ يُضِلُّواْ عِبَادَكَ وَلَا يَلِدُوٓاْ إِلَّا فَاجِرٗا كَفَّارٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Innaka in tatharhum yudilloo AAibadaka wala yalidoo illa fajiran kaffaran
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed, if You leave them, they will mislead Your servants and not beget except [every] wicked one and [confirmed] disbeliever.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: For if You spare ˹any of˺ them, they will certainly mislead Your servants, and give birth only to ˹wicked˺ sinners, staunch disbelievers.

ayahs.textArabic: رَّبِّ ٱغۡفِرۡ لِي وَلِوَٰلِدَيَّ وَلِمَن دَخَلَ بَيۡتِيَ مُؤۡمِنٗا وَلِلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ وَٱلۡمُؤۡمِنَٰتِۖ وَلَا تَزِدِ ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ إِلَّا تَبَارَۢا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Rabbi ighfir lee waliwalidayya waliman dakhala baytiya muminan walilmumineena waalmuminati wala tazidi alththalimeena illa tabaran
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: My Lord, forgive me and my parents and whoever enters my house a believer and the believing men and believing women. And do not increase the wrongdoers except in destruction."
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: My Lord! Forgive me, my parents, and whoever enters my house in faith, and ˹all˺ believing men and women. And increase the wrongdoers only in destruction.”
